grant_title: Social Change Marketing Campaign Services for Stormwater Education
project_area: Stormwater education and water quality awareness campaign in a nine-town portion of Chittenden County, Vermont
eligibility_summary: Open to qualified Contractors and/or Organizations to implement a social change marketing campaign (Rethink Runoff) for stormwater education in Chittenden County, Vermont. Annual budget for professional services estimated between $7,000 and $15,000 (excluding media and subconsultant costs).
